name: collection_page_6_collections_sale

observed_strengths.observation: Active sale collection with 24 products including Father's Day 'up to 60% off' — seasonal promotional calendar in place

missing_or_weak.observation: Sale collection meta description is empty — no descriptive text for SEO; sale pages attract discount-intent traffic that deserves a description
Sale section shows only apparel (Letterman Jacket, Corduroy Jacket, Maple Cinnamon Tee) in visible product headings — core coffee products may be discounted but weren't visible in H3 product headings

purchase_path_notes: Sale collection drives urgency-based conversions. The seasonal Father's Day promo is active and well-promoted. Empty meta description is a quick win for SEO.
